general.title: General
general.description: Set project-level defaults for entry tab and chat layout.

defaultTab.title: Default Top Tab
defaultTab.description: Used the first time you open this project.

hints.issues: Start from issue tracking and triage.
hints.chat: Land directly in the chat workspace.
hints.schedule: Open with planning and upcoming runs.

chatDefaultMode.title: Chat Default Layout
chatDefaultMode.description: Choose whether Chat opens in minimal mode or files mode by default.

hints.files: Chat + files side-by-side for coding flow.

filesDefaultMode.title: Files Default Layout
filesDefaultMode.description: When Chat defaults to files mode, choose the Files layout.

issueIntegration.title: Issue Integration
issueIntegration.description: Connect GitHub, GitLab, or Linear to sync issues into this project.
issueIntegration.noProvidersHint: Connect a GitHub, GitLab, or Linear workspace to start syncing issues.

providerCard.deleteConfirm: Remove this integration? Synced issues will remain in the local database.

platform.githubDesc: Connect to GitHub.com or GitHub Enterprise.
platform.gitlabDesc: Connect to GitLab.com or self-hosted GitLab.

token.label: Personal Access Token
token.hint: Requires at least read access to issues.

linear.teamKeyHint: The short prefix shown in issue identifiers (e.g. ENG-42).
linear.teamIdHint: Found in Linear → Settings → Team → General.
linear.tokenHint: Create at Linear → Settings → API → Personal API Keys.

editProvider.title: Edit Integration
editProvider.newTokenPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current token
